name: vc-ai-infra-scout
description: Deal-sourcing scout for a VC running an AI-infrastructure thesis spanning crypto-AI / decentralized-AI, robotics / embodied-AI, and agentic payments (inference/serving, GPU & compute, training stacks, vector/data infra, agent infra, eval/observability, model-ops; decentralized compute/GPU, on-chain AI agents, DePIN-for-AI; robotics foundation models, humanoid/embodied-AI, sim-to-real, actuation/sensor stacks; agentic-payment rails, agent commerce, x402/stablecoin agent settlement). Discovers emerging companies and founders from Hacker News, Product Hunt, the web, and Twitter/X; searches recent pre-seed/seed fundraising news on Twitter/X and LinkedIn and summarizes the tweets of the investors at the funds leading those rounds to distill the live thesis; then dedupes, ranks, flags who has NOT raised yet, and enriches the top lead. Paid per call across mixed rails (direct Circle x402 + routed MPP + routed x402 on Base) via selat-pay (USDC via Circle Gateway), no API keys.

thesis.description: The sub-thesis keyword for HN/PH/web discovery and the founder shortlist — AI-infra, crypto-AI, robotics/embodied-AI, or agentic payments (e.g. 'humanoid robotics foundation models', 'agentic payment rails') (used as ${thesis}).

twitterQuery.description: Twitter/X keyword search for FOUNDER buzz; defaults conceptually to the thesis if the VC doesn't override (used as ${twitterQuery}).

fundraisingQuery.default: AI infrastructure startup raised seed pre-seed funding round
fundraisingQuery.description: Keyword query for FUNDRAISING NEWS — used by both the Twitter and the LinkedIn fundraising searches to surface recent pre-seed/seed raises in AI-infra & crypto-AI (used as ${fundraisingQuery}).

investorQuery.default: AI infra seed fund partner thesis
investorQuery.description: Twitter/X keyword search for INVESTOR/fund chatter — set it to the funds leading the rounds surfaced by the fundraising searches to pull the tweets the agent summarizes into a thesis (used as ${investorQuery}).

domain.description: That company's domain for the enrichment step (used as ${domain}).

steps.label: Hacker News discovery — Tavily advanced search scoped to HN (direct x402, Circle registry)
Product Hunt discovery — Parallel web search (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
launch + funding web context — Exa search (routed x402 on Base via SELAT Router)
Twitter/X founder & buzz search — AIsa advanced_search (direct x402, Circle registry)
fundraising news on Twitter/X — AIsa advanced_search for recent pre-seed/seed raises (direct x402, Circle registry)
fundraising news on LinkedIn — Tavily advanced search scoped to LinkedIn posts (direct x402, Circle registry)
lead-investor thesis tweets — AIsa advanced_search over the funds leading those rounds (direct x402, Circle registry)
founder shortlist — Apollo people-search (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
company enrichment — Apollo org-enrichment (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
